packets.reason: The architecture and synthetic lease controls exist, but the required held-out oracle, learned/rule, single-specialist, fallback, and compute-matched baseline comparison has not been run.
packets.reopen_condition: A public-safe held-out routing workload with request-feature provenance, persistent budget ownership, fallback/abstention calibration, and interference counterfactuals is available.

packets.reason: No matched adaptive-compute trace reports first-hit, last-correct, stop reason, branch credit, dissent, latency, and fixed-step quality authority together.
packets.reopen_condition: A reproducible latency/compute-matched deliberation workload and fixed-step reference are available.

packets.reason: The structural recurrence and trainable-state contract is already owned by Circle/Coil receipt slices and Lean bridges; the historical model project adds lineage but no independent model-quality evidence.
packets.reopen_condition: A matched baseline demonstrates capability or efficiency beyond the existing structural contract without conflating generated, frozen, trainable, and updated state.
packets.evidence_route: Existing Circle receipt suite; future empirical model lane

packets.reason: Existing capacity-accounting, budget-ledger, costed-route, workload-quality, load-stability, CI-cost, and flagship replay artifacts already reject addressable/resident/populated/trainable and declared/observed conflation.
packets.reopen_condition: A later packet changes resource identity, displaced-cost, storage/reviewer/accelerator receipt, or governance-tax semantics.
packets.evidence_route: Registered resource flagship and capacity-accounting validators

packets.reason: The book has admission and lineage record discipline, but no public-safe learning workload proves actual mutation, independent splits, fixed-probe change, forgetting, rollback, and descendant invalidation together.
packets.reopen_condition: A disposable dataset/model workload with content pins, seeds, overlap controls, actual parameter deltas, fixed probes, forgetting, rollback, and descendant invalidation is available.

packets.reason: No local policy update binds per-path credit, changed-decision ablation, evaluator independence, checkpoint acknowledgement, and runtime-output causality.
packets.reopen_condition: A reproducible policy-update workload with a matched no-update baseline and causal checkpoint-to-output trace is available.

packets.reason: Historical search records are not a matched champion/challenger campaign with single-axis changes, fixed initialization/data/steps, best/final checkpoint authority, and preserved failed families.
packets.reopen_condition: A public-safe matched-budget campaign with failure-preserving negative-knowledge frontier and stop rules is available.

packets.reason: The existing self-improvement transition schema, finite route gates, protected partitions, evaluator-separation checks, rollback/residual controls, and stale-promotion negatives own this bounded record discipline.
packets.reopen_condition: A real mutation transaction is proposed or the protected mutable partition/evaluator/debt-stop semantics change.
packets.evidence_route: Registered self-improvement boundary harness and Lean route

packets.reason: The existing steward lifecycle probe owns retry ceilings, failure artifacts, debt ownership, acknowledgement, archival, recovery, release gating, and sunset routing as bounded record discipline.
packets.reopen_condition: A deployed steward action, treasury effect, contributor-governance event, federation, or release action becomes available for replay.

packets.reason: A safe public fixture cannot establish secret custody, device binding, measured boot, entropy, rotation, anti-rollback, or hardware attestation truth without a real hardware/security lane.
packets.reopen_condition: A non-secret disposable custody workload with real attestation, rotation, revocation, relocation, and rollback controls is available.

packets.reason: No public-safe multi-participant federation run binds participant identity, content admission, signed untrusted payloads, round identity, peer leases, revocation, and contribution identity.
packets.reopen_condition: A disposable multi-node federation fixture with distinct principals and adversarial replay/revocation controls is available.

packets.reason: The incorporation roadmap, completion ledger, priority ordering, packet gates, explicit dispositions, validators, and exact blockers now form the governed phase registry; roadmap status is not treated as evidence.
packets.reopen_condition: A packet changes priority, ownership, dependency, acceptance evidence, or retirement criteria.

packets.reason: The source inventory, external-grounding status, proof/evidence gaps, active evidence cycle, and this disposition ledger preserve the independent-literature, reproduction, provenance, and durable-memory ownership queues.
packets.reopen_condition: A new source, reproduction result, proof result, or durable-memory ownership decision changes the backlog.
packets.evidence_route: Source/evidence audit and governed research backlog surfaces

non_claims: A completed disposition means the roadmap decision is closed, not that the chapter core claim is promoted.
A deferred disposition is an exact blocker, not evidence of failure or impossibility.
Historical projects remain one related local lineage and are not independent replication.
